things.name: Al-Masjid an-Nabawi (Prophet's Mosque)
things.description: Islam's second holiest mosque, built by the Prophet Muhammad containing his tomb - Muslims only

things.name: Quba Mosque
things.description: The first mosque ever built, constructed by the Prophet Muhammad in 622 CE

things.name: Masjid al-Qiblatayn (Two Qiblas Mosque)
things.description: Mosque where the direction of prayer was changed from Jerusalem to Mecca during prayer

things.name: Al-Baqi Cemetery (Jannat al-Baqi)
things.description: Ancient Islamic cemetery with the graves of the Prophet's family and companions

things.name: Uhud Mountain & Battle Site
things.description: Site of the 625 CE Battle of Uhud with the graves of the 70 martyrs who fell there

things.name: Madain Saleh (Al-Hijr)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Nabataean ruins 400km north - the first UNESCO site in Saudi Arabia

things.name: Medina Museum (Dar Al Madinah)
things.description: History of the holy city from Islamic times to the present with interactive exhibits

things.name: Al-Noor Mall & Medina Souqs
things.description: Traditional markets selling dates, prayer beads, perfumes and Islamic artefacts

things.name: Masjid al-Ghamama
things.description: Historic 7th-century mosque where the Prophet performed Eid prayers

things.name: Hejaz Railway Museum
things.description: Museum in the original Ottoman Hejaz railway station with restored locomotives
